sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19208" key="balaneio/mfalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰλᾰν-ειόμφᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19208.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a boss like the valve of a bath,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φιάλη β.</foreign> a cup <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a round bottom,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
